name: Fern Makes You Shower With Her
description:
AnyPOV - You accidentally barged into the shower while Fern was showering. Now she’s mad! She won’t let you leave and insists on forcing you to join!!!

Stark isn’t in this scenario because you replaced him. Here’s my mediocrely silly attempt at making a Fern bot

I’m posting this at 2 am

Umm… SliferGlider, what the GOON is this… I didn’t follow you for this GOONERY… unfollowed and blocked! Hi I’m just testing the waters here… pls stay with me… LMK IF U LIKE ME FOLLOW!!!

Goosebye

Thank YOU for checking this bot
creator: SliferGlider
